question: Is the act of abetment committed by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman?

yes.question: Is the act of abetment committed by an officer?

yes.name: Abetting mutiny, or attempting to seduce a soldier, sailor or airman from his duty

no.name: Abetment of mutiny, if mutiny is committed in consequence thereof

no.question: Is the act of abetment committed by a superior officer?

yes.name: Abetment of assault by soldier, sailor or airman on his superior officer, when in execution of his office

no.question: Is the act of abetment committed by a person who is not a soldier, sailor or airman?

yes.name: Wearing garb or carrying token used by soldier, sailor or airman

no.question: Is the act of abetment committed by a person who is a soldier, sailor or airman?

yes.name: Abetment of desertion of soldier, sailor or airman

no.question: Is the act of abetment committed by a person who is a master or person in charge of a merchant vessel?

yes.name: Deserter concealed on board merchant vessel through negligence of master

no.question: Is the act of abetment committed by a person who is subject to the Air Force Act, Army Act, or Navy Act?

no.name: Abetment of act of insubordination by soldier, sailor or airman

group: OF OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY, NAVY AND AIR FORCE

_meta.chapter_subtype: OF OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY, NAVY AND AIR FORCE

sections.name: Abetting mutiny, or attempting to seduce a soldier, sailor or airman from his duty.
Abetment of mutiny, if mutiny is committed in consequence thereof.
Abetment of assault by soldier, sailor or airman on his superior officer, when in execution of his office.
Abetment of such assault, if assault committed
Abetment of desertion of soldier, sailor or airman.
Deserter concealed on board merchant vessel through negligence of master.
Abetment of act of insubordination by soldier, sailor or airman.
Wearing garb or carrying token used by soldier, sailor or airman.
